name: dungeon-crawler
title: Dungeon Crawler
description: A roguelike dungeon crawler. Mods can read game state, modify player stats, create custom items, and react to game events.

log.description: Writes a message to the mod console.

player.description: Functions for reading and modifying the player character.

getHealth.description: Returns the player's current health points.

getMaxHealth.description: Returns the player's maximum health points.

getPosition.description: Returns the player's current position in the dungeon.

setHealth.description: Sets the player's health to a specific value. Clamped to 0..maxHealth.

examples.title: Full heal
examples.description: Restores the player to full health.

getInventory.description: Returns all items in the player's inventory.

addItem.description: Adds an item to the player's inventory.

world.description: Functions for querying the game world.

getCurrentLevel.description: Returns the current dungeon level number (1-indexed).

getEnemies.description: Returns all enemies on the current level.

spawnEnemy.description: Spawns an enemy at the given position.

params.name: type
params.description: The type of enemy to spawn.

get.description: Reads a value from the mod's persistent storage.

set.description: Writes a value to the mod's persistent storage.

modify-player.description: Modify the player's stats, inventory, and equipment.

modify-world.description: Spawn or remove entities in the game world.

storage.description: Read and write persistent data for this mod.

Item.description: An item that can exist in the player's inventory.

EnemyType.description: Types of enemies that can appear in the dungeon.
